tasks.label: Open iOS Simulator
tasks.command: SIM_UDID="$(xcrun simctl list devices available | sed -nE 's/^[[:space:]]*iPhone 17 Pro \(([A-F0-9-]+)\) \((Booted|Shutdown)\).*/\1/p' | head -n 1)"; if [ -z "$SIM_UDID" ]; then echo 'iPhone 17 Pro simulator is not available'; exit 1; fi; PREF="$HOME/Library/Preferences/com.apple.iphonesimulator.plist"; /usr/bin/plutil -insert "DevicePreferences.$SIM_UDID.ConnectHardwareKeyboard" -bool NO "$PREF" 2>/dev/null || /usr/bin/plutil -replace "DevicePreferences.$SIM_UDID.ConnectHardwareKeyboard" -bool NO "$PREF"; open -a Simulator --args -CurrentDeviceUDID "$SIM_UDID"

tasks.label: Ensure Booted iPhone 17 Pro
tasks.command: SIM_UDID="$(xcrun simctl list devices available | sed -nE 's/^[[:space:]]*iPhone 17 Pro \(([A-F0-9-]+)\) \((Booted|Shutdown)\).*/\1/p' | head -n 1)"; if [ -z "$SIM_UDID" ]; then echo 'iPhone 17 Pro simulator is not available'; exit 1; fi; PREF="$HOME/Library/Preferences/com.apple.iphonesimulator.plist"; /usr/bin/plutil -insert "DevicePreferences.$SIM_UDID.ConnectHardwareKeyboard" -bool NO "$PREF" 2>/dev/null || /usr/bin/plutil -replace "DevicePreferences.$SIM_UDID.ConnectHardwareKeyboard" -bool NO "$PREF"; xcrun simctl boot "$SIM_UDID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; xcrun simctl bootstatus "$SIM_UDID" -b

tasks.label: Disable Hardware Keyboard in Simulator
tasks.command: osascript -e 'tell application "Simulator" to activate' -e 'delay 0.2' -e 'tell application "System Events"' -e 'tell process "Simulator"' -e 'try' -e 'set m to menu item "Connect Hardware Keyboard" of menu 1 of menu item "Keyboard" of menu 1 of menu bar item "I/O" of menu bar 1' -e 'if (value of attribute "AXMenuItemMarkChar" of m) is not missing value then perform action "AXPress" of m' -e 'end try' -e 'end tell' -e 'end tell'

tasks.label: Build ecritu (iOS Simulator)
tasks.command: python3 tools/bump_edition_number.py Config/Edition.xcconfig && xcodebuild -project "écritu.xcodeproj" -scheme "écritu" -destination "generic/platform=iOS Simulator" -derivedDataPath "${workspaceFolder}/build" build

tasks.label: Install ecritu on iPhone 17 Pro
tasks.command: SIM_UDID="$(xcrun simctl list devices available | sed -nE 's/^[[:space:]]*iPhone 17 Pro \(([A-F0-9-]+)\) \((Booted|Shutdown)\).*/\1/p' | head -n 1)"; if [ -z "$SIM_UDID" ]; then echo 'iPhone 17 Pro simulator is not available'; exit 1; fi; APP_PATH="$(find "${workspaceFolder}/build/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator" -maxdepth 1 -name '*.app' 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)"; if [ -z "$APP_PATH" ]; then APP_PATH="$(find "${workspaceFolder}/build/Debug-iphonesimulator" -maxdepth 1 -name '*.app' 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)"; fi; if [ -z "$APP_PATH" ]; then echo 'No .app found under build/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator'; exit 1; fi; xcrun simctl install "$SIM_UDID" "$APP_PATH"

tasks.label: Launch ecritu on iPhone 17 Pro
tasks.command: SIM_UDID="$(xcrun simctl list devices available | sed -nE 's/^[[:space:]]*iPhone 17 Pro \(([A-F0-9-]+)\) \((Booted|Shutdown)\).*/\1/p' | head -n 1)"; if [ -z "$SIM_UDID" ]; then echo 'iPhone 17 Pro simulator is not available'; exit 1; fi; xcrun simctl launch "$SIM_UDID" com.kusakabe.ecritu

tasks.label: Uninstall ecritu from iPhone 17 Pro
tasks.command: SIM_UDID="$(xcrun simctl list devices available | sed -nE 's/^[[:space:]]*iPhone 17 Pro \(([A-F0-9-]+)\) \((Booted|Shutdown)\).*/\1/p' | head -n 1)"; if [ -z "$SIM_UDID" ]; then echo 'iPhone 17 Pro simulator is not available'; exit 1; fi; xcrun simctl uninstall "$SIM_UDID" com.kusakabe.ecritu
